docs.title: About Chef Mate
docs.text: Chef Mate is your personal cooking companion app, designed to help you discover recipes, plan meals, and make the most of your kitchen.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Recipe Discovery — Browse and search thousands of recipes tailored to your tastes.
  • Meal Planning — Plan your weekly meals with ease.
  • Smart Grocery Lists — Automatically generate shopping lists from your meal plan.
  • Dietary Preferences — Filter recipes by dietary needs and preferences.

docs.title: Contact
docs.text: Have questions or feedback? Reach out to us at support@chefmateapp.com.

docs.title: What is Chef Mate?
docs.text: Chef Mate is a cooking companion app that helps you discover recipes, plan meals, and generate grocery lists.

docs.title: Is Chef Mate free to use?
docs.text: Chef Mate is free to download with optional premium features available through a subscription.

docs.title: What platforms is Chef Mate available on?
docs.text: Chef Mate is available on iOS and Android.

docs.title: How do I create an account?
docs.text: Download Chef Mate from the App Store or Google Play and follow the on-screen sign-up instructions.

docs.title: How do I delete my account?
docs.text:
You can delete your account from any of the desktop, Android, or iOS apps:

  1. Go to Settings
  2. Select Manage Profile
  3. Click Delete Profile
  4. Confirm the deletion when prompted

Once confirmed, your account and all associated data will be permanently removed.

docs.title: How do I delete a recipe?
docs.text: Open the recipe you want to remove, tap the menu icon (three dots), and select Delete Recipe. Confirm the deletion when prompted. This will remove the recipe from your saved collection but will not affect your account or other data.

docs.title: How do I delete grocery items?
docs.text: Navigate to your Grocery List, swipe left on the item you want to remove, and tap Delete. To clear your entire grocery list, tap the menu icon at the top of the list and select Clear All Items.

docs.title: How do I delete meal planning items?
docs.text: Go to your Meal Plan, tap the meal you want to remove, and select Remove from Plan. To clear an entire day or week, tap the menu icon and select Clear Day or Clear Week.

docs.title: Will deleting data affect my account?
docs.text: No — deleting recipes, grocery items, or meal plan entries only removes that specific data. Your account, profile, and all other saved content remain intact.

docs.title: Can I save my favorite recipes?
docs.text: Yes — tap the heart icon on any recipe to save it to your favorites.

docs.title: Can I share recipes with friends?
docs.text: Yes — use the share button on any recipe to send it via text, email, or social media.

docs.title: How do I report a bug?
docs.text: Please contact us at support@chefmateapp.com with a description of the issue and your device information.

docs.title: Privacy Policy
docs.text: Last updated: April 21, 2026

docs.title: Introduction
docs.text: Chef Mate ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share information when you use the Chef Mate application ("App").

docs.title: Information You Provide
docs.text:
• Account information (name, email address)
  • Profile preferences (dietary restrictions, favorite cuisines)
  • Content you create (saved recipes, meal plans, grocery lists)

docs.title: Information Collected Automatically
docs.text:
• Device information (device type, operating system, unique device identifiers)
  • Usage data (features used, interactions, crash logs)
  • Log data (access times, pages viewed, app performance)

docs.title: How We Use Your Information
docs.text:
We use the information we collect to:

  • Provide and maintain the App
  • Personalize your experience and recommend recipes
  • Communicate with you about updates and support
  • Analyze usage to improve the App
  • Ensure the security of our services

docs.title: Sharing Your Information
docs.text:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with:

  • Service providers who help us operate the App
  • Legal authorities when required by law
  • Business partners only with your consent

docs.title: Data Retention
docs.text: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your data at any time.

docs.title: Your Rights
docs.text:
You have the right to:

  • Access, update, or delete your personal information
  • Opt out of marketing communications
  • Request a copy of your data

docs.title: Security
docs.text: We use industry-standard measures to protect your information, but no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

docs.title: Changes to This Policy
docs.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of changes by posting the updated policy within the App.

docs.title: Contact Us
docs.text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at privacy@chefmateapp.com.

docs.title: Terms of Use
docs.text: Last updated: April 21, 2026

docs.title: Acceptance of Terms
docs.text: By downloading, accessing, or using Chef Mate ("App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the App.

docs.title: Use of the App
docs.text:
You agree to use Chef Mate only for lawful purposes. You must not:

  • Use the App in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the App or its systems
  • Distribute malware or other harmful code through the App
  • Use the App to harass, abuse, or harm others

docs.title: Accounts
docs.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

docs.title: Intellectual Property
docs.text: All content, features, and functionality of the App are owned by Chef Mate and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our permission.

docs.title: User Content
docs.text: By submitting content to the App (such as recipes or reviews), you grant Chef Mate a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to use, display, and distribute that content within the App.

docs.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
docs.text: The App is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the App will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components.

docs.title: Limitation of Liability
docs.text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chef Mate shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the App.

docs.title: Termination
docs.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the App at any time, with or without notice, for any reason.

docs.title: Changes to These Terms
docs.text: We may modify these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the App after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

docs.title: Governing Law
docs.text: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Chef Mate operates.

docs.title: Contact Us
docs.text: If you have questions about these Terms of Use, contact us at legal@chefmateapp.com.
